name: Social Butterfly
description: Meet all of the characters at the party in one playthrough.

name: Ashley
description: Complete Ashley's story by helping her prank her sister!

name: Drunk and Disorderly: Ashley
description: Get Ashley drunk and on a path of destruction!

name: Smooth Operator: Ashley
description: Smooth talk your way into Ashley's affection without completing her main storyline.

name: Rachael
description: Complete Rachael's storyline and win her affection.

name: Katherine
description: Complete Katherine's main storyline and help her get back at her boyfriend.

name: Newcomer: Vickie
description: Get Vickie Vixen to show up at the party.

name: Vickie
description: Complete Vickie's main storyline for a "hot" ending.

name: Amy: Scavenger Hunt
description: Complete Amy's Scavenger Hunt path.

name: Amy
description: Complete Amy's main storyline and win her affection.

name: Duck n' Weave
description: Avoid Frank AND Derek's fists at the same time for at least 60 seconds. (No locking doors!)

name: First Impressions
description: Strip at the door and make your first impression to every party goer in the nude. (Vickie Not Needed)

name: Ice Bath
description: Get on the "shit list" of every guest of the opposite sex at the party. (Guests you have to invite not included.)

name: Inspector
description: Inspect at least 30 items in one playthrough.

name: Smooth Operator: Madison
description: Sweet talk your way into unlocking the special social ability of the vaunted dumpster raccoon.

name: Drunk and Disorderly: Madison
description: Give Madison a few and see what happens when she takes on the persona of her favorite reality TV star.

name: Drunk and Disorderly: Stephanie
description: Give Steph some liquid courage and find out what she REALLY thinks of her boss!

name: Stephanie
description: Say no to milk, drink school, and help Stephanie discover her true calling in life.

name: The Muse: Madison
description: Show off your artistic skills and ruin a friendship to get a reward from Madison!

name: The Muse: Derek
description: Take the high road by not sleeping with Madison and experience the wonders of friendship with Derek.

name: Rule 34
description: Yeah I mean...you can, but why would you?

name: Howz It Goin Dood
description: Experience a magical, non-violent, artistic moment with Frank.

name: Relentless
description: Outside of "Derek Smash!", get Patrick beaten up 5 times in one playthrough.

name: Do You Smell Blood?
description: Give Frank a concussion, then take advantage of the situation and free the booze!

name: Caught in the Act
description: Get caught by another character in the middle of some sexy time!

name: Party Pooper
description: Experience a better life through chemistry, and shed six pounds at the same time! Thanks Laxapas!

name: The Brahdyssey
description: Politely listen to all of Patrick's epic backstory.

name: I'll Be Back
description: Unlock CompuBrah, learn about Patrick's businesses, and maybe, just maybe stop a Skynet situation from playing out.

name: If at First You Don't Succeed...
description: Throw a dildo at it. Obviously. Do we have to tell you everything?

name: Benedict Brahrnold
description: Give Patrick Rachael's death mix and do what it takes to shut down his site!

name: A Striking Resemblance
description: Get to the bottom of Patrick and Rachael's drama, and help Pat win her over!

name: Notice Me, Sensei
description: Provide a little inspiration, a bit of fitness guidance, and a nutritional treat to increase Leah's power level.

name: La Coochadora
description: Stoke the fires of rivalry within Brittney by giving her an extremely fishy gift.

name: Derezzed
description: They're smarter than they look! Experience the Easter Egg ending of Lety's content.

name: Te Amo Lety
description: Complete the Opportunity "Vida La Lety".

name: The Elder Brahs
description: Reverse pickpocket an item into Patrick's pants during "Disrupt the Disruptor".

name: Simple Geometry
description: Successfully interrupt Leah and Lety's conversation with a popper, from very long range.

name: The Harder They Fall...Dood
description: Defeat Frank 1-on-1 without any sparring or combat training.

name: The Bride
description: Help Leah bring the serpent to a swift end, and reap the rewards...

name: Ronin
description: Convince Leah to abandon her lawful ways...and survive!

name: Sucker Punch
description: Punch Frank, Derek, and Patrick when they're not looking and not in combat, all in one playthrough.

name: Money Shot
description: Peg Frank with a sex toy while he is dancing on the roof. Not peg...hit. You get it.

name: I Know Grump-Fu
description: Help the Game Grumps leave the party using the magic of virtual reality!

name: Do Not Burn
description: Do the opposite of this, and get the Game Grumps onto their noble steeds! Yeehaw, and stuff.

name: IRL Let's Player
description: Watch the Game Grumps cause a scene 8 times in one playthrough. Don't forget to subscribe, thumbs up, rate me, updoot, etc.

name: D-Club Certified
description: Get Frank to join the D-Club.

name: Casanova
description: Reach a...climactic moment with four ladies in one playthrough.

name: Casabrova
description: Reach a...climactic moment with two men in one playthrough.

name: Good Ol' Days
description: Complete "Memory Lane" and convince Derek you take your past as seriously as he does.

name: Snapped
description: Uncover the fate of Purgalicious and present the evidence to Derek.

name: Beyond the Call of Dude-y
description: Really give Frank something to cherish...for instance, a fully naked picture of Katherine.

name: Good Riddance!
description: Crush Frank's self-esteem and his notions about manhood to the point where he can't take it anymore! Buh bye, dude!

name: Against All Odds
description: For once, make love, not war with Frank.

name: Now It's a Party!
description: Liven up the scenery by getting three or more partygoers to enjoy the rest of the night while showing varying amounts of skin.

name: The Magic Number
description: Cumplete Vickie's "Good Guests Gone Bad" Opportunity with Vickie and another lover.

name: A Friend in Need...
description: Help your gal pal Brittney out by fulfilling her request for a spare shirt.

name: The Crush
description: Get Brittney to realize who would really make her happy. Then, play wingwoman and help her score!

name: The Crush(es)
description: Get Brittney to realize who would really make her happy. Then, see if she'll share a little bit of that pleasure with you.

name: Host Hijinks
description: Help Derek get back at Madison for subjecting him to all her mind games.

name: Hijinks Averted
description: Help Derek take the higher path, and instead of getting revenge on Madison, make a more wholesome choice.

name: Love Conquers All
description: Can you give more to Brittney than just a boring old shirt? Take your relationship to new heights and find out!

name: Congrats, A Celebrity Hates You
description: Fail the Doja Cat DLC before you even get her to the party.

name: That's a Nice Bush!
description: Catch drunk Amala red-handed with some hedge trimmers.

name: Doja's Dope-Ass Dinolicious Danceapalooza
description: Successfully pull off one of the greatest backyard concerts ever.

name: Hungry Hungry Hot Tubs
description: Accidentally make Doja Cat go for a swim.

name: It Smells Like Roses
description: Listen to the soothing sounds of nature, directly from Doja Cat.

name: Life Found a Way
description: You were so preoccupied with whether or not you could, you didn't stop to think if you should... be wasting time with this.

name: The Most Wonderful Time of the Year
description: Get all the party guests involved in a snowball fight.

name: Deck the Balls
description: Make the holidays merrier by hanging Nana's special mistletoe.

name: It's an Older Code, But It Checks Out
description: Successfully unlock Brahd Mode on Compubrah.

name: Release the Kraken
description: Share a few drinks with Liz Katz and become a third wheel in your own adventure.

name: Elementary, My Dear Player
description: Solve the most convoluted Murder Mystery of all time.

name: That's Not How You Get Ahead
description: Discover the consequences of overheating.

name: Mask of Virility
description: Get interrupted three times with Liz Katz and then let her get her claws in you.

name: Stop It Step Bro
description: Rescue Liz Katz from the dryer of doom in the most romantic way possible.

name: Dumbest Player Achievement
description: Really? You couldn't figure it out even with the hint? Is that your fault or ours?

name: Dancing for Gold Coins
description: Fulfill every WoW player's fantasy and have Liz Katz cosplay as an elf.

name: Solar Flare
description: Help Derek's dancing burn brighter than the sun and then help protect his dignity... sort of.

name: A Display of Affection
description: Choose the right person to share a valentine gift with for an Easter Egg!

name: Job Well Done
description: Help Derek land the job of his dreams - which is any job. The economy is rough, people.

name: Laying Some Pipe
description: Successfully repair a leaky pipe and a sisterly relationship. Only one repair will last, though!

name: One Is the Loneliest Number
description: Be too afraid to talk to girls.

name: The Future Is Ads
description: Have Derek's handyman lesson get interrupted by an ad.

name: The Greatest Trip of Her Life
description: Give Madison the Babs Special and see her trip through to its conclusion.

name: One Man Army
description: Use the power of Nano-Nuts to fight your way back to the hot tub.

name: Meat's Back on the Menu
description: Reawaken a wasteland warrior through the scent of burning flesh.

name: Nocturnal Temptations
description: Travel back in time and complete the filming of Nocturnal Temptations.

name: The Future Is Ads 2
description: Get interrupted by an ad while listening to Down the Mystery Hole.

name: Toga! Toga!
description: Find and wear a hillbilly's bedsheets. Just don't look too closely at the stains.

name: Some People Just Want to Watch the World Burn
description: Immortalize tiny Patrick on film by giving him the spotlight with Gisella.

name: Some People Just Want to Watch Girls Kiss
description: Make Vickie's dreams come true by giving her the spotlight with Gisella.
